    B

    BLAST_FURNACE - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     

    C

    CAMPFIRE - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     

    D

    dev.yanianz.star.recipes - package dev.yanianz.star.recipes
    The recipes module provides useful utilities to query recipes on your server quickly.

    F

    FURNACE - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     

    G

    getInputs(T) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    getMachine() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    getOutput(Stream, ItemStack[]) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    getRecipe(NamespacedKey) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return a Recipe based on the provided NamespacedKey (if that Recipe is of type Keyed) The method works similar to Bukkit.getRecipe(NamespacedKey), though it is significantly faster since we operate on a cached HashMap and don't have to perform any data conversion.
    getRecipeClass() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    getRecipeInput(MinecraftRecipe, T) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return an Array of RecipeChoice representing the given Recipe's input choices.
    getRecipeInput(T) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return an Array of RecipeChoice representing the given Recipe's input choices.
    getRecipeOutput(MinecraftRecipe, ItemStack...) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return an Optional describing the output of a Recipe with the given type and given inputs.
    getRecipes(Class) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return a Set of Recipes of the given Type contained in this RecipeSnapshot.
    getRecipes(Predicate) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return all Recipes matching the given Predicate.
    getRecipesFor(ItemStack) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return a Set of Recipes that result in the given ItemStack.
    getRecipesFor(Material) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return a Set of Recipes that result in an ItemStack with the given Material.
    getRecipesWith(ItemStack) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return a Set of Recipes that take in the given ItemStack.

    M

    MinecraftRecipe<T> - Class in dev.yanianz.star.recipes
     

    O

    of(T) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     

    R

    RecipeSnapshot - Class in dev.yanianz.star.recipes
    This class represents a Snapshot of the Server's registered Recipes.
    RecipeSnapshot(Plugin) - Constructor for class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This will create a Snapshot of all Recipes on the plugin's Server.

    S

    SHAPED_CRAFTING - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    SHAPELESS_CRAFTING - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    SMITHING - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    SMOKER - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    STONECUTTER - Static variable in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    stream() - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
     
    stream(Class) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This method will return a Stream of Recipes of the given Type contained in this RecipeSnapshot.
    streamAllRecipes() - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.RecipeSnapshot
    This will stream all Recipes stored in this Snapshot.

    V

    validate(ItemStack[]) - Method in class dev.yanianz.star.recipes.MinecraftRecipe
